EmailTemplate.description: Customer has not accepted the Close Brother commission consent. This is the email to confirm that we have cancelled their policy from inception.
EmailTemplate.name: CDC Cancelled 2
EmailTemplate.subject: Your business insurance has been cancelled
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You elected to pay for your Kingsbridge business insurance policy {!Policy__c.Name} through direct debit payments.
Our credit providers, Close Brothers Premium Finance, required you to consent to the commission Kingsbridge receive in order to provide the loan for your insurance policy.
You have not provided this consent/You have declined to consent and so Close Brothers have now rejected your credit application. This means no payments have been made for your insurance policy.
As no alternative payment arrangements have been made, we have cancelled your insurance policy from the date of inception [inception date].
You are now no longer able to claim under this policy, so please disregard any previous documentation you have received from us as null and void.
Since your insurance policy has been cancelled, we want to ensure you're aware that your business may not be covered against claims if you don't have another insurance policy in place.
It is possible to open a new business insurance policy with the sales team at Kingsbridge - however, please be aware this cover cannot be back-dated, which may leave you with a gap in cover.
Please call us on 01242 808740 if you would like to discuss this matter further.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
